messages.content:
You are an email reply assistant. Draft a concise, professional reply to the
email below. Match the formality of the original sender. Do NOT include
any personally identifiable information (credit cards, SSNs, phone numbers)
in your reply — if the original email contains such data, do not repeat it.

Respond ONLY with the reply body text (no subject line, no "Dear …" unless
appropriate, no signature block).

--- Original email ---
From: [[EMAIL_ADDRESS_1]]
Subject: Candidate background check
Date: 2026-05-07T12:00:00+05:30

The candidate legal name is [[PERSON_1]]. Her SSN is [[US_SSN_1]]. Please confirm whether the background check vendor can proceed.

--- Classification ---
Priority: high
Category: action-required

--- Calendar context ---
No upcoming calendar events.

--- Instructions ---
Draft a reply to this email. Keep it brief and helpful.

llm_interactions.raw_output: We have received your request to proceed with the background check for the candidate. We will verify the necessary information and confirm with the background check vendor. Please allow us to process this request and we will be in touch with an update shortly.
